title: Gift Card Usage
description: Where can I use my gift card and which merchants accept it?
narrative: The user wants to know the places—both online and physical—that accept their gift card, including categories of stores and location-based options; relevant content should list accepted merchants, provide map locations, and describe usage categories.

title: Lamb Tagine Recipe
description: How can I prepare a traditional Moroccan lamb tagine at home?
narrative: The user is seeking a complete lamb tagine recipe, including a list of ingredients (lamb, spices, vegetables, etc.), step‑by‑step preparation and cooking instructions, cooking time, and any common variations or tips. Relevant documents should provide a full, executable recipe for a Moroccan‑style lamb tagine.

title: Lotus Car
description: Find Lotus automobiles that are for sale, including their models, years, prices, and key specifications.
narrative: The user wants to locate Lotus cars on the marketplace, preferably used listings, with enough detail to evaluate a purchase (model name, model year, mileage, price, body type, fuel, etc.). Relevant documents should mention Lotus as a make and provide vehicle listings or sale information, allowing the user to compare options and assess suitability.

title: Veal Paupiettes
description: What is a complete recipe and cooking method for paupiettes de veau?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed cooking guide for veal paupiettes, including a list of ingredients, quantities, preparation steps, cooking times, and any optional tips or variations. Relevant documents should provide a full recipe (ingredients, measurements, wine or vinegar usage, seasoning), step‑by‑step instructions (searing, deglazing, simmering), total and prep times, and suggestions for accompanying sides or serving ideas.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What options are available to protect a vehicle from sun exposure, including products, installation methods, and legal considerations?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how to shield a car’s interior and occupants from the sun. Relevant results should describe automotive sun‑protection solutions such as solar‑tinted window films, UV‑blocking coatings, and related kits, explain their benefits (heat reduction, UV ray blocking, fuel savings, safety), and note any legal requirements (e.g., minimum visible light transmission for front windows). Documents that discuss product types, installation guides, performance specifications, and compliance details are considered relevant.

title: Petit Bateau brand
description: What is the French clothing brand Petit Bateau, and what products and style does it offer?
narrative: The user queried “small vessel,” which is the literal translation of the French phrase “petit bateau.”  Instead of looking for a literal small boat, the user is interested in the brand that uses this phrase as its name.  The relevant documents describe Petit Bateau’s women’s collection – dresses, T‑shirts, underwear, swimwear, and accessories – and highlight the brand’s casual‑chic aesthetic, history, and product lines.  A relevant answer should explain the brand’s origin, its focus on timeless basics, and enumerate the main categories of apparel and accessories offered.

title: Renault Passenger Cars
description: What recent news or business activities involve the sale or restructuring of Renault's passenger car division?
narrative: The user is looking for information about any transactions, corporate restructuring, or sales related specifically to Renault's passenger car business. Relevant documents should mention Renault, passenger cars, and details of a sale, acquisition, or personnel changes affecting that segment.

title: War School
description: What is the War School, what does it teach, and how can its publications be accessed or purchased?
narrative: The user is looking for an overview of the War School as an educational institution, including its mission, programs, location, and admission criteria, as well as practical information on obtaining its books and e‑books. Relevant documents should describe the War School’s purpose and courses, and provide details on ordering, formats, payment, and delivery of its publications.

title: Option Right
description: What is the “right of option” offered by Pôle emploi and how does a claimant exercise it?
narrative: The user wants a clear explanation of the “right of option” (droit d'option) in the French unemployment system: its definition, eligibility requirements (e.g., unpaid benefits, at least 130 days/910 hours of work, allowance thresholds), the procedural steps to request it from Pôle emploi, the consequences of choosing it (higher allowance and duration versus forfeiting previous rights), and illustrative examples. Relevant documents must describe these rules, conditions, and the application process.

title: AXA Client Space
description: How do I access and use AXA’s online client space to manage my accounts and insurance contracts?
narrative: The user is looking for information about AXA’s client portal (sometimes called “Client Space” or “Client Area”), including how to retrieve or change their client identifier, log in, and what services (contract management, document access, advisor contact, etc.) are available there. Relevant documents should describe the AXA client portal, login procedures, ID recovery, and the range of self‑service features offered.

title: Best Electric Car
description: Which electric car provides the best overall value considering price, range, performance, and available purchase incentives?
narrative: The user is seeking a comparative ranking of electric vehicles to identify the top choice for purchase. Relevant documents should describe model prices, battery range, charging times, performance characteristics, and details of government or regional subsidies that affect total cost of ownership. Documents that only mention a single model without comparison, or that focus solely on technical aspects unrelated to overall value (e.g., battery chemistry without price or incentive context) are not relevant.

title: Late Blight Potatoes
description: What is late blight in potatoes and how can it be prevented, managed, or safely consumed?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about late blight affecting potatoes, including disease symptoms, impact on crops, control and prevention strategies, safety of eating or storing infected potatoes, and recommendations for replanting. Relevant documents should discuss potato late blight pathology, agricultural management practices, and food safety considerations.

title: Heaven to Earth
description: What is the New Age work or website titled “From Heaven to Earth” and how is it related to Monique Mathieu?
narrative: The user is seeking background information about the phrase “From Heaven to Earth,” specifically the New Age content authored or presented by Monique Mathieu, including its origin, purpose, and the teachings or claims associated with it. Relevant results should describe the work’s title, author, thematic focus, and any linked community or website.

title: Mad History Space
description: Where can the film "The Mad History of Space" (also known as "La Folle Histoire de l'espace") be streamed or purchased online?
narrative: The user wants to locate legitimate online access to the movie titled "The Mad History of Space." Relevant results should list official streaming platforms, rental services, purchase options, or download services that legally host the film, including details such as format, language, and availability. Content describing illegal torrent or unauthorized download sites is not relevant.

title: Legacy Office
description: What is the TV series referred to as “The Legacy Office” and what details are available about it?
narrative: The user is looking for information on a TV series that appears to be mis‑named as “The Legacy Office.” Relevant material should describe the correct title (Le Bureau des Légendes / The Office of Legends), its premise, creators, main cast, number of seasons and episodes, broadcast history, and where it can be watched (e.g., streaming platforms, DVD/Blu‑Ray). Documents that provide a synopsis, production background, critical reception, and details about individual seasons (including season 5) are considered relevant. Any source that does not pertain to this French espionage drama should be excluded.

title: Prevail Definition
description: What is the meaning of the verb 'to prevail' and how is it conjugated in English?
narrative: The user wants a clear explanation of the verb 'to prevail', including its definition, usage as an intransitive verb, and a complete set of conjugations across tenses, moods, and persons. Relevant documents should provide grammatical information, example sentences, and any related forms (e.g., infinitive, past participle).

title: Unknown Territory Show
description: What television program takes celebrities to remote, uncharted locations and documents their experiences?
narrative: The user seeks information about a TV series that sends personalities to remote, unknown lands, including the show’s concept, host(s), broadcast network, episode examples, and related productions. Documents that describe the program’s premise, presenters, episode list, production details, and any spin‑off or follow‑up content are considered relevant.

title: Mashed Potato
description: How can I make or buy mashed (crushed) potatoes, possibly flavored with truffle?
narrative: The user is looking for information on preparing or obtaining mashed or crushed potatoes. Relevant documents should provide recipes, cooking instructions, or product descriptions for mashed potato items, including any variations such as truffle‑flavored versions. Items that detail ingredients, preparation steps, cooking times, storage, or nutritional information for such products are considered relevant.

title: Event Space
description: What venues or rental spaces are available in Paris for hosting events?
narrative: The user is looking for information about spaces that can be rented for events in Paris, including details such as location, size, capacity, amenities, and contact information for booking. Relevant documents should describe event venues, halls, or similar spaces in Paris that can accommodate gatherings, conferences, or other functions.

title: Green Energy Supplier
description: What renewable electricity and gas suppliers are available in France, and how do their prices, contract terms, and customer service compare?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information on French energy suppliers that provide 100 % renewable electricity and gas, including details on pricing structures, contract flexibility, switching procedures, and quality of customer support. Relevant documents should describe specific green suppliers, their product offerings, price components, contract clauses, and any guidance on how to transition from a current provider to a greener alternative.

title: Kia Car Lineup
description: What Kia vehicles are currently offered and what are their starting prices?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of Kia's current model range in the United States, including vehicle types (e.g., SUV, sedan, hybrid, electric) and their manufacturer‑suggested starting MSRP. Relevant results should mention each Kia model, its classification, and the listed base price, as well as any pertinent pricing caveats presented by the manufacturer.

title: Gallic Origins
description: What does the term “Gallic” refer to, and how has its historical meaning and cultural significance evolved?
narrative: The user wants a concise historical overview of the Gallic peoples, the origin of the word “Gallic,” its use by Julius Caesar, its connection to the ancient Gauls, and how the concept has been reshaped in French historiography and national identity. Relevant content should explain the Celtic tribes labeled as Gauls, the development of the term in Roman and later French contexts, and discuss myths versus scholarly perspectives on French ancestry.

title: Faro Car Rental
description: What car rental companies operate in Faro, Portugal, and what are their rates, locations, and key rental conditions?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about renting a car in Faro. Relevant documents should list the car‑rental agencies available in Faro (including airport and city locations), provide price ranges or daily rates, describe vehicle categories, and mention important rental terms such as driver age requirements, insurance options, and extra fees. Documents that include user reviews, agency contact details, and comparative rankings are also pertinent.

title: Nantes Car Rental
description: Where can I rent a car in Nantes, France?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on car‑rental providers in Nantes, including agency locations (e.g., near the train station), available vehicle types, pricing, age and license requirements, booking procedures, and any special services such as 24‑hour self‑service or one‑way rentals. Relevant documents should describe these details and help the user choose a suitable rental option.

title: Potato diseases
description: What are the common diseases of potatoes and how can they be recognized and treated?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about diseases that affect potato plants, including symptoms, causal agents (fungi, bacteria, viruses, pests) and recommended control or prevention measures. Relevant material should describe specific potato ailments such as late blight, downy mildew, cryptogamic diseases, Colorado beetle damage, and other fungal or bacterial infections, together with cultural or chemical management strategies. General potato cultivation tips that do not address disease identification or treatment are not relevant.

title: Beaujolais Crus
description: What are the ten official Beaujolais crus, their distinguishing characteristics, and where can I find more information about them?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of the recognized Beaujolais crus beyond the Nouveau release. Relevant material should enumerate each of the ten crus (Brouilly, Côte de Brouilly, Chénas, Chiroubles, Fleurie, Juliénas, Morgon, Moulin‑à‑Vent, Régnié, Saint‑Amour), describe their terroir and typical flavor profiles, and provide information about wineries, tourism sites, or publications that discuss these specific crus. Documents that only mention Beaujolais in general or focus solely on Nouveau are not sufficient.

title: Boat Shoes
description: What footwear is appropriate for use on a boat, including styles, materials, and features that provide safety and comfort on wet decks?
narrative: The user is seeking information about shoes that are specifically designed or suitable for boating. Relevant documents should describe types of boat shoes (e.g., deck shoes, deck sneakers), their key characteristics such as slip‑resistant soles, water‑resistant or quick‑dry materials, non‑marking treads, and any style considerations. Product listings, buying guides, and reviews that address these criteria are relevant, while generic shoe advertisements not mentioning boating or marine use are not.

title: Renault Space
description: What are the specifications, pricing, and availability details for the Renault Space vehicle?
narrative: The user is looking for information specifically about the Renault Space model (including variants such as SpaceClass, Trafic Space, etc.). Relevant documents should provide details on the model's engine options, dimensions, seating capacity, price ranges, optional features, lease or purchase terms, and any promotional or ecological bonuses associated with the Space. Documents that only discuss other Renault models (e.g., Clio, Megane, Captur) are not relevant.

title: Corfu Car Rental
description: What car rental companies, rates, vehicle classes, and reservation details are available for renting a car in Corfu?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about renting a car on the island of Corfu (often entered as “Corfou”). Relevant documents should describe car‑rental providers serving Corfu Airport or other pick‑up points on the island, list price ranges for different vehicle categories, outline booking and cancellation policies, and mention any insurance or deposit requirements. Documents that only discuss general car‑rental services unrelated to Corfu, or that lack pricing or location specifics, are not relevant.

title: Meeting Car Rental
description: What car rental services are available near the meeting location in Saint‑Denis, Réunion?
narrative: The user is planning to attend a meeting in Saint‑Denis, Réunion and needs to find a nearby car rental agency that can provide a vehicle for the meeting day. Relevant documents should mention car rental companies in Saint‑Denis, their contact information, operating hours, and the ability to book a car for short‑term business use.

title: Lincoln Cars
description: What information is available about Lincoln automobiles, including current models, specifications, and brand history?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of the Lincoln brand, focusing on its present‑day vehicle lineup, key features and specs of each model, pricing information, and a brief historical background. Relevant documents should discuss Lincoln as a luxury division of Ford, describe its current models (e.g., Continental, Navigator, MKZ), highlight notable characteristics (engine types, technology, luxury amenities), mention its heritage (presidential limousines, brand evolution), and provide any recent announcements or concept cars.

title: Car Accident Compensation
description: How can I determine the compensation I am entitled to after a car accident?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on obtaining compensation following a car accident, including the applicable laws (e.g., Badinter law), the calculation methodology, factors influencing the award (injury severity, disability level, loss of income, aesthetic or sexual prejudice), examples of typical compensation cases, and advice on accessing legal or medical experts. Relevant documents are those that explain compensation scales, eligibility criteria, victim categories, and procedural steps for claiming damages.

title: Bordeaux Concerts
description: What upcoming concerts are taking place in Bordeaux and where can I find details such as dates, artists, and ticket information?
narrative: The user is looking for current and upcoming live music events in the Bordeaux area, specifically concerts scheduled at venues like Arkéa Arena. Relevant documents should list the concert name, performing artist(s), date and time, venue location, and any available ticket or reservation information. Pages that provide concert calendars, event listings, or official venue schedules for Bordeaux are considered relevant.

title: Indre-et-Loire Jobs
description: Where can I find current job listings and employment resources for the Indre-et-Loire department in France?
narrative: The user is seeking information about employment opportunities within the Indre-et-Loire region, specifically official job exchange sites, public sector vacancy listings, and any portals that aggregate local job offers. Relevant results should describe the Centre de Gestion d'Indre-et-Loire job exchange, how to access public and applicant areas, and links to additional regional or national job portals that cover Indre-et-Loire.

title: Energy Mediation
description: What is an energy mediator and how can they help resolve disputes with energy suppliers?
narrative: The user wants to understand the role, functions, and access procedures for an energy mediator (e.g., the National Energy Ombudsman) in France, including how mediation works, what consumer rights are involved, and where to seek assistance for disputes with electricity, gas, or other energy providers. Relevant documents should describe the Ombudsman’s services, dispute‑resolution steps, and related consumer‑protection information.

title: Office Computers
description: What are the latest trends, options, and buying recommendations for desktop and PC hardware suitable for an office environment?
narrative: The user is seeking information about office‑focused computers and related equipment. Relevant documents are those that discuss office computer trends, product listings, comparisons, and purchase guides for desktops, PCs, tablets, or hybrid devices intended for work settings. Content that provides specifications, pricing ranges, or recommendations for selecting appropriate office hardware should be considered relevant.

title: Silver Photography
description: What techniques, materials, and resources are needed to create and process silver (black‑and‑white) photographs?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about silver photography, including the types of silver‑based cameras, black‑and‑white film, development chemicals, printing methods, and where to find labs or community forums that discuss these topics. Relevant documents should describe silver cameras, silver (argentic) photo labs, film and paper recommendations, processing workflows, and venues for sharing or learning about silver photography.

title: Leek Quiche Recipes
description: What is a good recipe for leek quiche, including ingredients, instructions, and possible variations?
narrative: The user is looking for a complete leek quiche recipe. Relevant documents should provide a list of ingredients, step‑by‑step preparation instructions, cooking time, and optional tips such as flavor variations (e.g., honey‑curry, cheese, seafood), dietary adaptations (vegetarian, vegan), or storage methods (freezing). Any page that offers a full, usable recipe for leek quiche or a detailed variation of it satisfies the need.

title: Free Car Games
description: What free online car games are available, especially those suitable for children and offering 2D or 3D gameplay?
narrative: The user wants a curated list of free, web‑based car games that can be played directly in a browser. Relevant results should describe collections of such games, note whether they are 2D or 3D, indicate they are free to play, and mention suitability for a younger audience (e.g., child‑friendly content). Documents that provide ratings, brief game descriptions, or links to the games themselves satisfy the need.

title: Employment Mobility Aid
description: What support programs and resources help individuals relocate internationally for employment?
narrative: The user is seeking information on aid and services that facilitate employment-related international mobility, such as advisory counseling, financial assistance, visa guidance, and job‑search resources provided by agencies like Pôle emploi and the EURES portal. Relevant documents should describe eligibility, application procedures, and the type of personalized support offered to job seekers planning to work abroad.

title: SFR Customer Space
description: What is the SFR (or Orange) customer space and how can I access or manage my account there?
narrative: The user is looking for information about the online “space” provided by the French mobile operator SFR (or its partner Orange), including what services it offers (e.g., 4G/5G plans, CO2‑neutral options), how to log in, reset a password, link an email, or otherwise manage their mobile account. Relevant documents are those that describe the customer portal, account‑linking procedures, password‑reset flows, and the mobile plans available through the SFR/Orange space.

title: Oil Lamp Purchase
description: What are the options, brands, accessories, and maintenance instructions for buying an oil lamp?
narrative: The user is looking for commercial information about oil lamps, including product listings, brand comparisons (e.g., Cao Camping, Gaudart, Favorit), accessories such as glass, spout, wick, and guidance on how to maintain or replace parts. Relevant documents should describe available models, prices, material options, and practical how‑to advice.

title: Madeira Car Rental
description: What are the available car rental options, prices, pickup locations, and insurance terms for renting a car on the island of Madeira?
narrative: The user is looking for information on renting a vehicle while in Madeira. Relevant documents should describe car rental providers operating on the island, include details on pricing (including any fees or discounts), pickup and drop‑off locations (e.g., airport, hotels, other towns), vehicle categories, mileage allowances, and insurance coverage (full coverage, SCDW, deductible information). Reviews or testimonials that confirm service quality and transparency of terms are also pertinent. Documents unrelated to Madeira or to other forms of transportation are not relevant.

title: New Potatoes
description: What are new potatoes, and what are the best ways to store, handle, and cook them?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about new (early) potatoes, including their definition, physical characteristics, shelf‑life, storage recommendations, and suitable preparation methods such as sautéing, rissolée, and other recipes. Relevant documents should describe what makes a potato 'new', how to keep it fresh, and provide cooking instructions or recipes that highlight the unique qualities of new potatoes.

title: Return to Work Bonus
description: What is the return‑to‑work (employment) bonus, who qualifies for it, and how can it be claimed?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about the return‑to‑work bonus, including its purpose, eligibility thresholds based on income and family situation, the amount of the tax credit, the applicable dates (e.g., final year of payment, abolition date), and the steps required to claim it through a tax return. Relevant documents are those that describe the employment bonus, its rules, amounts, deadlines, and claim procedures.
